description_long: This is a modern bungalow residence surrounded by a dense perimeter of tall trees, creating a private and enclosed environment. The main building is centrally located and features a flat roof, with a symmetrical front entrance flanked by two trees and a circular fountain in the front yard. The property includes a backyard swimming pool and a tennis court, both situated behind the main structure. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted concrete, and the windows are arranged in a regular, balanced pattern. The front yard is open and landscaped, while the rear is dedicated to recreational amenities. The entire property is enclosed by a low, decorative fence that matches the modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a symmetrical entrance, surrounded by trees, featuring a front fountain, backyard pool, and tennis court within a fenced property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular fountain, two front trees, and the dense tree perimeter.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the backyard swimming pool, tennis court, and the enclosure of trees.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the rear facade of the bungalow, with the tree perimeter and less visible recreational features.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the side of the bungalow, the pool, tennis court, and the tree enclosure.
